dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WAIT. HOW CAN THAT JERK SUHO... AND THE SHY BOY FROM THE BOOKSTORE BE THE SAME PERSON?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHY IS HE ACTING SO DIFFERENT?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: At times like this, I always turn to the internet.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: QUESTION ABOUT A GUY I'M KIND OF INTO

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: There's a guy I'm kind of into lately: He's the same guy at school, but he acts so different when I wear makeup and when I don't. He's a total jerk at school, but sweet at the comic shop. He doesn't even recognize me without makeup and glasses. Why is that?

dialogue.speaker: L_WANT_PIZZA
dialogue.line: MAYBE THIS GUY YOU'RE INTO IS SUPER UNCOMFORTABLE AROUND PRETTY GIRLS AND FEELS MORE COMFORTABLE AROUND AVERAGE GIRLS.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Suho's uncomfortable around me...? Is that it?

dialogue.speaker: PLUM_CANDY
dialogue.line: BAHAHA HMM... SOMETHING MORE IS GOING ON HERE. MAYBE HE LIKES YOU MORE WITHOUT MAKEUP! LOL BUT THERE'S LIKE 0% CHANCE OF THAT.

dialogue.speaker: VIVIAN
dialogue.line: DO YOU REALLY LOOK THAT DIFFERENT WHEN YOU WEAR MAKEUP AND WHEN YOU DON'T? RESPECT:

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Nah way. N-no.

dialogue.speaker: BOOMBOOMBOOM
dialogue.line: LIKE YOUR POST HAHAHA! KEEP ME UPDATED: LOL

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Suho.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: UGH! THIS IS DRIVING ME CRAZY.

dialogue.speaker: Juyoung
dialogue.line: HEY JUGYEONG!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Doesn't bother knocking.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT DO YOU WANT?

dialogue.speaker: Juyoung
dialogue.line: WHAT DO YOU THINK OF A GIRL LIKE ME?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT DO I THINK? ISN'T THAT OBVIOUS?

dialogue.speaker: Juyoung
dialogue.line: N-NO, IT'S NOT. I WANT YOUR HONEST OPINION:

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: SHOULD I START WITH YOUR RIDICULOUS FACE OR YOUR TERRIBLE SENSE OF FASHION?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: There must be at least one guy who finds me attractive.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Ignored.

dialogue.speaker: Juyoung
dialogue.line: NOPE. NOT IN A MILLION YEARS. NOW GET LOST! GO AWAY!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: As annoying as he may be, Juyoung is right.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: The thought that anyone would like my face when it looks like this...

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Reminds me of everything I've been through:

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Damn, this acne.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: HAHA I ALMOST PISSED MYSELF!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: DUDE, HAHA THAT'S HARSH.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: DUDE, CHECK OUT THE GIRL IN FRONT OF US. DAMN, WHAT AN UGLY COW! HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: HAHAHA SHHH! SHE MIGHT HEAR YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 3
dialogue.line: WHO CARES? I'M JUST STATING THE TRUTH HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Or this...

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WOW, SO MANY PEOPLE HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Guy 1
dialogue.line: HEY, WANNA GET SOMETHING TO EAT? MY TREAT!

dialogue.speaker: Guy 2
dialogue.line: HEY GORGEOUS, LOOKING FOR SOME FUN?

dialogue.speaker: Guy 3
dialogue.line: DOWN TO HANG WITH SOME HANDSOME DUDES TONIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I've seen it all. I'm used to it.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I need to face reality. Suho wouldn't even bat an eye at a girl like me.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: TH-THIS IS FOR ME??

dialogue.speaker: Bookstore Clerk
dialogue.line: YEAH. YOU KNOW, THAT TALL, FOREIGN-LOOKING KID? HE TOLD ME TO GIVE THIS TO THE 'PIMPLY GIRL IN GLASSES AND A SWEAT SUIT' WHO COMES HERE EVERY DAY. YOU FIT THE DESCRIPTION.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: PIMPLY GIRL IN GLASSES AND A SWEAT SUIT?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: THAT'S HOW HE DESCRIBES ME?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT'S THIS? A COMIC BOOK...?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: ITOJUNJI'S HORROR TALES! GASP! THE CURSED SERIES NO. 3!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WAIT A MINUTE! A LIMITED EDITION COPY SIGNED BY ITOJUNJI HIMSELF?!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: This is a signed Itojunji copy I've always treasured. I'd like to give it to you to say thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: OH MY GOD! HOW'D HE GET HIS HANDS ON SOMETHING SO RARE?! I CAN'T BELIEVE IT! HOW THOUGHTFUL SUHO IS!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Super naive.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The next day.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Hm... He definitely acts nice sometimes, but he usually comes off so cold.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: It's so easy to talk to him at the comic store, but it's impossible to say a word to him here. Wonder why...?

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 1
dialogue.line: THAT SHOULD DO IT FOR TODAY! GREAT JOB, GUYS!

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 2
dialogue.line: HEY, ISN'T IT WEIRD THAT SUHO ONLY TALKS ABOUT SCHOOL STUFF DURING OUR STUDY SESSIONS? NO SMALL TALK OR ANYTHING.

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 3
dialogue.line: OH. YEAH.

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 2
dialogue.line: I'VE NEVER SEEN HIM SMILE. NOT EVEN ONCE!

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 3
dialogue.line: Y-YOU'RE RIGHT. BUT SMILE...

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 2
dialogue.line: I'VE HEARD RUMORS THAT HE WAS A LOT FRIENDLIER BACK IN MIDDLE SCHOOL.

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 3
dialogue.line: REALLY?

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 2
dialogue.line: YEAH, BUT SOMETHING MUST'VE HAPPENED THAT COMPLETELY CHANGED HIS PERSONALITY.

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 3
dialogue.line: I SEE.

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 2
dialogue.line: ANYWAY, I HOPE WE'LL BE BETTER FRIENDS WITH SUHO SOON!

dialogue.speaker: Study Group Member 3
dialogue.line: SAME HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: He was friendlier?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: AH. THAT FEELS SO MUCH BETTER!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: HUH? MY ALARM?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: OH, RIGHT! TODAY'S THE ANNUAL SALE!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I CAN'T MISS IT!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: UGH! BUT I JUST TOOK MY MAKEUP OFF!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: OH, WHATEVER: I'LL JUST GO OUT LIKE THIS.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: OKAY, TODAY, I'M BUYING EVERYTHING! I'M READY! HMPH.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I'LL DEFINITELY NEED A BIG BAG.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: MOM! I'M GOING OUT!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong's Mom
dialogue.line: DON'T STAY OUT TOO LATE!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: UNBELIEVABLE!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: THEY WEREN'T KIDDING ABOUT THE 50% SALE! HALF THE TOWN IS HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: BUT I'LL NEVER... GIVE UP!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHEW! I STILL GOT EVERYTHING I NEEDED! MISSION ACCOMPLISHED!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: NOW TO RETURN HOME!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: HEY JUGYEONG.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHO?

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: I KNEW IT WAS YOU:

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT THE HELL?!

summary: Jugyeong is confused by Suho's dual personality and seeks advice online, which leads her to reflect on past bullying. Suho then gives her a rare comic book, making her question his true feelings. Later, during a study session, Jugyeong overhears her friends discussing Suho's past friendly demeanor, just before she runs into him without makeup at a beauty sale.
